title: Aurora, 15591, The Grinch Official Merchandise Santa Palm Pal, Soft Toy, Green & Red
features: From the best-selling children's book How the Grinch Stole Christmas by author Dr. Seuss
100% Official Licensed Merchandise by Aurora World
Beanie soft toy which fits in the palm of your hand
Eco-friendly with filling and beans made from recycled plastics
description: Product Description From the best-selling children's book author Dr. Seuss and the movies "How the Grinch stole Christmas ", we bring you the troublesome creation, The Grinch. With almost 70 million books sold worldwide, the Grinch is a trademark character loved by people of all ages. Now you can show your love for the loveable green creature with a little help from this wonderful plush. The Grinch is dressed as Santa Claus and fits into the palm of your hand, full of beans which makes for a super soft and cuddly soft toy. This is the perfect gift. The Grinch is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Directions No specific directions required. Remove from packaging and enjoy.
